{{Infobox event
| name = Guild War
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Guild]] War is a large-scale conflict involving the various [[Imperial Guilds]] that serve to maintain balance within the [[Empire]]. While these organizations were traditionally united by their shared commitment to the [[Empire]], this bond has frayed, leading to intense hostilities. The conflict is characterized by factions divided between those who wish to restore an [[Emperor]] to the throne and those seeking to move beyond [[Imperial]] restrictions. The war has manifested in various ways, including territorial closures by groups like the [[Greenwardens]] and the [[Luminian Order]], as well as direct physical combat between members. This instability has had severe consequences, such as the weakening of defenses around [[Elder]] tombs and a breakdown in the cooperation required to secure the [[Great Elders]]. Although some viewed the chaos as beneficial for business, others noted that the fighting strained essential relationships and left the [[Empire]] vulnerable. The war eventually reached a formal conclusion when the [[Regents]] declared an end to the internal fighting following the discovery of criminal activities by the [[Imperial Steward]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] expresses surprise at the risk of a [[Guild War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A full-scale [[Guild War]] is being set.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] claims the [[Guild War]] does not matter.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|There was a [[Guild]] conflict/war.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The internal conflict is called the [[Guild War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Guild War]] has strained the relationship between [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Guild War]] weakened the defenses around the [[Elder]] tombs.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“The Guild War doesn’t matter,” Calder gasped.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shera couldn’t conceal her surprise. “We’re risking a Guild War?”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire events]]
